title: Vendor Change Record
description: Defines an audit log entry tracking changes in vendor postures, supplier privacy policy updates, or service APIs.

id.description: Unique identifier of the change event (e.g. vch_1234).

vendor_id.description: Identifier of the associated vendor (references vnd_1234).

change_type.description: Classification of the identified supplier change.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the change and its implications.

risk_delta.description: Assessment of risk impact resulting from this supplier shift.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the change was detected.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
